commands.review_summary:
The branch generalizes the stale closed-item command guard to include `re_review`, applies it before router responses and webhook fast-ack creation, and adds regression tests for pre-close and post-close closed-PR commands.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main routes closed-item `re_review` commands to a comment response and accepts issue-comment webhooks without a stale closed-PR guard before fast ack. I did not execute a live webhook in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs maintainer/contributor follow-up for real behavior proof; there is no narrow code repair for ClawSweeper to apply because the diff looks correct.

target.title: Fix stale closed PR re-review command handling
target.body:
## Summary
- skip pre-close re-review commands on closed PRs without scheduling router responses
- reject stale closed-PR re-review webhook events before fast ack creation
- add regression coverage for stale pre-close and post-close command behavior

Fixes https://github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/issues/177

## Verification
- ./node_modules/.bin/tsgo -p tsconfig.repair.json
- node --test test/repair/comment-router-core.test.ts test/repair/comment-webhook.test.ts
- npx --yes --cache /private/tmp/clawsweeper-npm-cache pnpm@10.33.2 run check
target.author: takhoffman
